title: Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available
summary: Anthropic introduced Claude Science, a beta AI workbench for researchers on macOS and Linux. It combines scientific tools, more than 60 curated skills and connectors, auditable artifacts, compute access, and a reviewer agent that checks citations and calculations.
friendlySummary: Anthropic made a Claude app for scientists that can help with research, data analysis, figures, and checking work.
whyItMatters: This points to AI products becoming workflow environments rather than chat windows. If the audit trail and local/HPC data handling work as advertised, scientists may get more help with analysis without losing reproducibility or control over sensitive datasets.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It may help researchers move faster while still keeping track of how results were made.
